get.description: Returns the list of short URLs.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page to be displayed. Defaults to 1

parameters.name: itemsPerPage
parameters.description: The amount of items to return on every page. Defaults to 10

parameters.name: searchTerm
parameters.description: A query used to filter results by searching for it on the longUrl and shortCode fields.

parameters.name: tags[]
parameters.description: A list of tags used to filter the result set. Only short URLs **with** these tags will be returned.

parameters.name: tagsMode
parameters.description:
Tells how the filtering by `tags` should work, returning short URLs containing "any" of the tags, or "all" the tags. Defaults to "any".
It's ignored if `tags` is not provided.

parameters.name: excludeTags[]
parameters.description: A list of tags used to filter the result set. Only short URLs **without** these tags will be returned.

parameters.name: excludeTagsMode
parameters.description:
Tells how the filtering by `excludeTags` should work, returning short URLs not containing "any" of the tags, or not containing "all" the tags. Defaults to "any".
It's ignored if `excludeTags` is not provided.

parameters.name: orderBy
parameters.description: The field from which you want to order the result.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: The date (in ISO-8601 format) from which we want to get short URLs.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: The date (in ISO-8601 format) until which we want to get short URLs.

parameters.name: excludeMaxVisitsReached
parameters.description: If true, short URLs which already reached their maximum amount of visits will be excluded.

parameters.name: excludePastValidUntil
parameters.description: If true, short URLs which validUntil date is on the past will be excluded.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: Get short URLs for this particular domain only. Use **DEFAULT** keyword for default domain.

parameters.name: apiKeyName
parameters.description:
Only get short URLs created with this API key.
This value is **ignored** if the request is performed with a non-admin API key that does not match this name.

post.description:
Creates a new short URL.

**Param findIfExists**: This new param allows to force shlink to return existing short URLs when found based on provided params, instead of creating a new one. However, it might add complexity and have unexpected outputs. These are the use cases: * Only the long URL is provided: It will return the newest match or create a new short URL if none is found. * Long url and custom slug are provided: It will return the short URL when both params match, return an error when the slug is in use for another long URL, or create a new short URL otherwise. * Any of the above but including other params (tags, validSince, validUntil, maxVisits): It will behave the same as the previous two cases, but it will try to exactly match existing results using all the params. If any of them does not match, it will try to create a new short URL.

customSlug.description: A unique custom slug to be used instead of the generated short code

pathPrefix.description: A prefix that will be prepended to provided custom slug or auto-generated short code

findIfExists.description: Will force existing matching URL to be returned if found, instead of creating a new one

domain.description: The domain to which the short URL will be attached

shortCodeLength.description: The length for generated short code. It has to be at least 4 and defaults to 5. It will be ignored when customSlug is provided

200.description: The result of parsing the long URL

400.description: Some of provided data is invalid. Check extra fields to know exactly what.

customSlug.description: Provided custom slug when the error type is https://shlink.io/api/error/non-unique-slug

domain.description: The domain for which you were trying to create the new short URL

value.title: Invalid custom slug
value.detail: Provided slug "my-slug" is already in use.

parameters.name: apiKey
parameters.description: The API key used to authenticate the request

parameters.name: longUrl
parameters.description: The URL to be shortened

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: The format in which you want the response to be returned. You can also use the "Accept" header instead of this

get.description: Returns the list of all tags used in any short URL

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page to display. Defaults to 1

parameters.name: itemsPerPage
parameters.description: The amount of items to return on every page. Defaults to all the items

parameters.name: searchTerm
parameters.description: A query used to filter results by searching for it on the tag name.

parameters.name: orderBy
parameters.description: To determine how to order the results.

204.description: The tag has been properly renamed

400.description: You have not provided either the oldName or the newName params.

403.description: The API key you used does not have permissions to rename tags.

value.detail: You are not allowed to rename tags
value.title: Forbidden tag operation

value.detail: You are not allowed to rename tags
value.title: Forbidden tag operation

404.description: There's no tag found with the name provided in oldName param.

409.description: The name provided in newName param is already in use for another tag.

value.detail: You cannot rename tag foo, because it already exists
value.title: Tag conflict

value.detail: You cannot rename tag foo, because it already exists
value.title: Tag conflict

parameters.name: tags[]
parameters.description: The names of the tags to delete

403.description: The API key you used does not have permissions to delete tags.

value.detail: You are not allowed to delete tags
value.title: Forbidden tag operation

value.detail: You are not allowed to delete tags
value.title: Forbidden tag operation

get.description: Returns the list of all tags used in any short URL, together with the amount of short URLs and visits for it

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page to display. Defaults to 1

parameters.name: itemsPerPage
parameters.description: The amount of items to return on every page. Defaults to all the items

parameters.name: searchTerm
parameters.description: A query used to filter results by searching for it on the tag name.

parameters.name: orderBy
parameters.description:
To determine how to order the results.

**Important!** Ordering by `shortUrlsCount`, `visits` or `nonBotVisits` has a [known performance issue](https://github.com/shlinkio/shlink/issues/1346) which makes loading a subset of the list take as much as loading the whole list.
If you plan to order by any of these fields, it's worth loading the whole list with no pagination.

get.description: Get general visits stats not linked to one specific short URL.
Get the list of visits to invalid short URLs, the base URL or any other 404.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: The date (in ISO-8601 format) from which we want to get visits.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: The date (in ISO-8601 format) until which we want to get visits.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page to display. Defaults to 1

parameters.name: itemsPerPage
parameters.description: The amount of items to return on every page. Defaults to all the items

parameters.name: excludeBots
parameters.description: Tells if visits from potential bots should be excluded from the result set

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The type of visits to return. All visits are returned when not provided.
Return only visits for this domain. Use **DEFAULT** keyword to return visits from default domain.

delete.description: Delete all visits to invalid short URLs, the base URL or any other 404.

get.description: Get the list of visits to any short URL.

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: The date (in ISO-8601 format) from which we want to get visits.

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: The date (in ISO-8601 format) until which we want to get visits.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page to display. Defaults to 1

parameters.name: itemsPerPage
parameters.description: The amount of items to return on every page. Defaults to all the items

parameters.name: excludeBots
parameters.description: Tells if visits from potential bots should be excluded from the result set
Return visits for short URLs that belong to this domain. Use **DEFAULT** keyword to return visits from default domain.

get.description:
Returns the list of all domains that have been either used for some short URL, or have explicitly configured redirects.
It also includes the domain redirects, plus the default redirects that will be used for any non-explicitly-configured one.

patch.description: Sets the URLs that you want a visitor to get redirected to for "not found" URLs for a specific domain

domain.description: The domain's authority for which you want to set redirects

200.description: The domain's redirects after the update, when existing redirects have been merged with provided ones.

get.description: Returns information to consume updates published by Shlink on a mercure hub. https://mercure.rocks/

501.description: This Shlink instance is not integrated with a mercure hub

value.title: Mercure integration not configured

value.detail: This Shlink instance is not integrated with a mercure hub.
